heading: Omitted
label: 1213 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which reaffirmed the status of the Central Council of Tlingit and Haida Indian Tribes as a federally recognized Indian tribe, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 103–454, title II, § 203108 Stat. 4792Nov. 2, 1994
